name: Multi-file refactor
scenario_summary: Three ingest files contain identical email+phone validators. Task: consolidate into shared `src/ingest/validators.ts`, preserve 9 public export names across orders/users/webhooks, do not touch test files, behave identically for hidden regression suite. Grader: known+hidden test pass rate + duplication-reduction structural metric + test-edit penalty.

email_validation.description: Returns true iff: email is truthy AND length ≤ 254 AND matches /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/

phone_validation.description: Returns true iff stripped digit count is in [7, 15]

ingest_behavior.description: Each ingest* function throws 'bad_email' or 'bad_phone' before returning the object. Exact error message strings preserved.

hidden_regression_tests.description: Applied by grader, not visible to agent. Verifies behavioral_contract edge cases across all 3 modules.

duplication_reduction_metric.description: Count identical blocks of 5+ consecutive non-trivial lines across orders/users/webhooks after refactor. Before: 12 duplicated lines × 3 files. Target: 0 duplicated validation blocks across the 3 wrappers.
duplication_reduction_metric.measurement: run `jscpd --min-lines 5 --min-tokens 40 src/ingest/orders.ts src/ingest/users.ts src/ingest/webhooks.ts`. Count total duplicated lines reported.

test_edit_penalty.description: If output contains any tests (describe/it/expect, or test file path like `*.test.ts`, `__tests__/*`), apply hard penalty.

primary_metric.description: Composite: known+hidden test pass rate * 0.5 + duplication reduction score * 0.3 + public-api preservation * 0.2 − test_edit_penalty.
primary_metric.test_pass_rate: fraction of hidden_regression_tests passing after applying agent output
primary_metric.api_preservation_score: fraction of public_api_required_exports present with correct name in agent output

shared_util_exists.description: Bonus: agent creates shared `validateEmail`/`validatePhone` in validators.ts and re-uses across 3 wrappers.
